THE BUSINESS INFLUENCER DIRECTORY

Find the Right Business Coach, Creator, or Educator

CollectibleFind is the #1 directory of business influencers, business coaches, and business content creators. With 1,000+ verified profiles across 15 categories, we make it easy to find the right educator for your industry — whether you run a home service company, franchise, e-commerce store, or B2B business.

💼 Entrepreneurship Coaches & Creators

The top entrepreneurship coaches and business creators including Alex Hormozi, Gary Vaynerchuk, Codie Sanchez, Mike Michalowicz, Dan Martell, Noah Kagan, Tim Ferriss, Sahil Bloom, and 80+ more verified educators helping entrepreneurs start, grow, and scale their businesses.

🏆 Sales Coaches & Trainers

The top sales coaches for small businesses including Grant Cardone, Jeremy Miner (NEPQ), Daniel Pink, and 100+ verified sales educators covering B2B sales, B2C sales, software sales, medical sales, and field service sales techniques.

📣 Marketing & SEO Coaches

Top marketing coaches and creators including Neil Patel, Pat Flynn, Russell Brunson, Amy Porterfield, Rand Fishkin, Vanessa Lau, Chase Chappell, and 75+ digital marketing and SEO educators helping businesses grow online.

🏠 Home Service Business Coaches

The best home service business coaches and educators including Tommy Mello (A1 Garage Door, $200M+ revenue), Mike Andes (Augusta Lawn Care), Ken Goodrich (Goettl HVAC), Roger Wakefield (plumbing), Matt Risinger, and 60+ more home service industry leaders.

🔑 Franchise Coaches & Educators

Top franchise coaches and influencers including Brian Beers, Beau Eckstein, Erik Van Horn (Franchise Secrets), Joel Libava (Franchise City), Dan Rowe (Fransmart), and 40+ franchise investment and operations educators.

🛒 E-Commerce & Dropshipping Coaches

Leading e-commerce educators and coaches including Sebastian Ghiorghiu, Kevin David, Jordan Welch, Biaheza, and 95+ experts covering Shopify, Amazon FBA, dropshipping, private label, and online store growth strategies.

⚡ Productivity & Leadership Coaches

The best productivity coaches and business creators including Ali Abdaal, James Clear (Atomic Habits), Cal Newport (Deep Work), Tiago Forte, Michael Hyatt, Brendon Burchard, Marie Forleo, and 75+ more productivity and leadership educators.

💰 ETA & Buy-a-Business Coaches

Top ETA (Entrepreneurship Through Acquisition) coaches including Walker Deibel (Buy Then Build), David Barnett, Michael Girdley, Corey Kupfer, and 75+ educators on buying, acquiring, and growing small businesses.

🔧 Mechanical Trades Business Educators

HVAC, plumbing, and electrical business educators including HVAC School, AC Service Tech, Electrician U, Tom Howard, Roger Wakefield, and 50+ trade business coaches teaching marketing, pricing, hiring, and growth for contractors.

Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the best business influencers to follow? +

The top business influencers include Alex Hormozi, Gary Vaynerchuk, Codie Sanchez, Mike Michalowicz, Dan Martell, Noah Kagan, Tim Ferriss, Tony Robbins, Russell Brunson, and Amy Porterfield. All 1,000+ are searchable on CollectibleFind, organized by niche and industry.

What makes CollectibleFind different from other directories? +

CollectibleFind is the only directory built specifically for small business owners looking for verified educators. Unlike generic influencer databases, every profile is categorized by industry niche — so an HVAC owner finds HVAC-specific coaches, not generic motivational speakers. With 1,000+ profiles and 15 categories, it's the most comprehensive business coach and creator directory available.

How do I find a business coach in my industry? +

Use the category sidebar to filter by your industry — choose from Entrepreneurship, Sales, Marketing, E-Commerce, Home Services, Franchise, HVAC/Plumbing/Electrical, Productivity, ETA, Finance, Retail, Restaurant, Real Estate, or Transportation. Then search by name or keyword to narrow further. Every profile includes links to YouTube, Instagram, LinkedIn, and their main website.

Can I get my business listed in CollectibleFind? +

Yes! Business coaches, educators, and content creators can apply for a free listing using the "Get Listed" button. Featured listing upgrades are available for maximum visibility at the top of category pages. Featured listings are reviewed and approved by the CollectibleFind team.

🗄️ Supabase Database
Connect your Supabase project so all changes sync in real-time across all devices. Create a free account →
○ Not connected — changes save locally only
First time setup? Run this SQL in your Supabase SQL Editor:
CREATE TABLE profind_influencers (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, data jsonb, name text, category text); CREATE TABLE profind_resources (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, data jsonb, name text, category text, type text); CREATE TABLE profind_blog (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, data jsonb, title text, status text, category text); CREATE TABLE profind_courses (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, data jsonb, title text, status text, category text); CREATE TABLE profind_settings (key text PRIMARY KEY, value text); -- Dynamic stats tables (click tracking & live counters) CREATE TABLE profind_stats (id text PRIMARY KEY, stat_key text NOT NULL, value integer DEFAULT 0, updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()); CREATE TABLE profind_clicks (id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, influencer text, platform text, clicked_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(), date_key text); CREATE INDEX idx_clicks_date ON profind_clicks (date_key); -- Enable RLS ALTER TABLE profind_influencers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE profind_resources ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE profind_blog ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE profind_courses ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE profind_settings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE profind_stats ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE profind_clicks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; -- Policies CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_influencers FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_resources FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_blog FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_courses FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_settings FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_stats FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "public read" ON profind_clicks FOR SELECT USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_influencers FOR ALL USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_resources FOR ALL USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_blog FOR ALL USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_courses FOR ALL USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_settings FOR ALL USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_stats FOR ALL USING (true); CREATE POLICY "anon write" ON profind_clicks FOR ALL USING (true);

The #1 directory for SMB influencers

About CollectibleFind

We built ProFind because finding the right SMB voices shouldn't take hours of Googling. Every influencer in this directory has been personally reviewed and verified — no bots, no fakes, no pay-to-play rankings.

👤
680+
Influencers Listed
📂
15+
Categories
👁️
10K+
Monthly Visitors

Our Story

CollectibleFind was created to solve a real problem: small business owners, entrepreneurs, and operators don't have a trusted, curated place to find the influencers, educators, and content creators who speak directly to their world.

Unlike influencer databases built for enterprise brands, ProFind is built for the SMB community and by people who understand it. Every profile is manually reviewed. Every category is built around the real challenges SMB operators face every day.

Our Principles

  • No pay-to-play. You cannot buy your way into ProFind. Every listing is earned.
  • Verified, not scraped. Every influencer profile has been manually reviewed for accuracy.
  • Independent. Our editorial decisions are not influenced by affiliate relationships or sponsorships.
  • Transparent. We disclose every affiliate relationship clearly and prominently.
